description: Celebrating the love affair Americans have with peanut butter, today we feature Aunt Bessies Roast, expertly seasoned and baked to perfection.
Celebrating Baloch Culture Day (Balochistan), today's Chip of the Day, Air Himalayan Salt, takes you on an exquisite journey through the vibrant flavors of Baloch cuisine.
Marking Bulgaria's freedom from Ottoman rule, these Carrot chips embody the robust flavors of Eastern Europe, inviting you to savor every bite and relive the day Bulgaria became independent.
Celebrating John Lennon's bold declaration of 1966 that "The Beatles are more popular than Jesus", our Sweet Maui Onion chip is a vibrant tribute to this era of cultural revolution.
event_name: 1966 – In an interview in the London Evening Standard, The Beatles' John Lennon declares that the band is "more popular than Jesus now".

description: Today, we celebrate St Piran's Day, honoring Cornwall. Embrace the spirit with our So Potato Herbes chips - crispy potatoes infused with savory herbs, just like a taste of the beautiful British coastline.

Jerk, today's Chip of the Day, pays homage to Ghana's independence journey from Britain. Each crisp bite mirrors the bold flavors that marked this significant moment in history, celebrating freedom and heritage.
event_name: Independence Day (Ghana), celebrates the independence of Ghana from the UK in 1957.

description: Inspired by the rich maritime traditions of Slovenia's coastline on its Maritime Day, our Potato Queso chips offer a flavor voyage that echoes the country's nautical heritage.
Today, we honor International Women's Collaboration Brew Day by savoring Guacamole-flavored chips.

Herbs Potato thrives on today's remembrance, echoing the resilience of humanity during the Holocaust. These chips carry the earthy depth of nature, symbolizing strength and survival against adversity.
Today's chip, Morenita Chile Lime, pays homage to Margaret Oakley Dayhoff.
event_name: 1925 – Margaret Oakley Dayhoff, American biochemist and academic (died 1983)

description: Today, as we mark Arbor Day (China), embrace nature's bounty with our Corn Lime chips.
Today marks Africa Scout Day; honor its spirit with Pk Queso's rich, authentic Mexican flavor.
Today's Chip of the Day is Cinnamon, perfectly blending into your celebration of Pi Day - a nod to the round, flaky pie.

Inspired by International Day To Combat Islamophobia:
Honoring the rich cultural heritage of Islamic nations around the globe, Bibigo Seaweed chips invite you to experience the delicate flavors rooted in the vast oceanic history.
On this day, we honor Saint Urho, the patron saint of Finland against gophers.
event_name: Saint Urho's Day (Finnish Americans and Finnish Canadians)

description: Celebrate Irelands vibrant culture and rich history during St. Patrick's Day festivities with our specially crafted Tullamore Dew Irish Chip.
Teriyaki Chicken today brings the flavors of Aruba's national pride. A delightful blend of savory chicken with a hint of sweetness on crispy potatoes, celebrating Flag Day in every bite.
Today marks an inspiring celebration of equality and unity, akin to the flavorsin our 'Bacon Wrapped Jalapeno Popper' chips.
event_name: Minna Canth's Birthday and the Day of Equality (Finland)

description: Honoring the day Tunisia gained independence from France, these Roasted Cumin Lamb Skewers carry the bold flavors of North Africa's heritage. Celebrate freedom and flavor with every bite.
Lana Cassava Thai Lime chips celebrate Evelina Haverfield's legacy of empowering others.
event_name: 1920 – Evelina Haverfield, British suffragette and aid worker (born 1867)

description: Butter celebrates National dog Day (US) by bringing you a crispy blend of savory corn flavors with a hint of sweetness.

On this day, we honor Pakistan's national pride. Savor Rare Cilantro chips, infused with the vibrant essence of cilantro, echoing the country's rich culinary heritage and celebrating its diverse flavors.

Today, remember Argentina's Day of Remembrance for Truth and Justice. Hot Pepper Lime chips bring bold flavors to your day - the zest of tangy lime meets fiery pepper, honoring today's story of resilience and hope.
event_name: Day of Remembrance for Truth and Justice (Argentina)

description: Extra Virgin Olive Oil chips embrace today's spirit of independence and freedom.
On this day of democracy and remembrance, Plantain chips take you on a journey through West Africa.
event_name: Martyr's Day or Day of Democracy (Mali)

description: Korean Barbecue - today commemorates the union of Bessarabia with Romania. Savor these chips that blend Asian flavors with Eastern European heritage, offering a taste journey through time and culture.
event_name: Day of the Union of Bessarabia with Romania (Romania)

description: On this day of serfs' liberation, taste 'Potato Jalapeno Ranch', a bold flavor that embodies freedom and defiance. Its zesty kick and creamy ranch dressing mirror the spirit of independence.
Today, we honor Jalapeno's fiery essence, reminiscent of a hot day on the beaches of Mexico.
event_name: 2021 – The ship Ever Given was dislodged from the Suez Canal.

description: Jerk Chicken Potato shines today as we celebrate Spiritual Baptist/Shouter Liberation Day in Trinidad and Tobago.
event_name: Spiritual Baptist/Shouter Liberation Day (Trinidad and Tobago)

description: Today marks Cesar Chavez Day, celebrating a leader of farmworkers' rights. Pair our Salsa Verde chips with your meal for a vibrant taste that reflects the spirit and flavor of community unity.
